name: ros-cdk-directmail

metadata.name: ros-cdk-directmail
metadata.summary: Aliyun SDK Copyright (C) Alibaba Cloud Computing All rights reserved. http://www.aliyun.com

documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DIRECTMAIL Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DIRECTMAIL from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-directmail';
```

modules.name: ros_cdk_directmail
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DIRECTMAIL Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DIRECTMAIL from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-directmail';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_directmail.Domain.attr_create_time
documentation: Attribute CreateTime: The creation time of the domain.

methods.name: ros_cdk_directmail.Domain.attr_domain_id
documentation: Attribute DomainId: The ID of the domain.

methods.name: ros_cdk_directmail.Domain.attr_domain_name
documentation: Attribute DomainName: The name of the domain.

methods.name: ros_cdk_directmail.Domain.attr_domain_type
documentation: Attribute DomainType: The type of the domain.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DirectMail::Domain`, which is used to create a domain name in Direct Mail.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDomain\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-directmail-domain>
